scenarios.title: Operator status shows empty recommendation providers block

gherkin.given: recommendations are enabled and no providers are configured
gherkin.when: the operator opens the status page
gherkin.then: the page shows the Recommendation Providers block and zero configured providers without fabricated rows

scenarios.title: Operator status regression fails when the provider block is absent

gherkin.given: the status page response does not include Recommendation Providers
gherkin.when: the E2E validates the empty-provider state
gherkin.then: the test fails with diagnostics instead of accepting the missing section
